name: Signed Overflow Check
description: Classic x+1>x overflow check that InstCombine folds to always-true at -O2 using nsw assumption.

name: Null Check After Dereference
reference: Linux kernel CVE-2011-1078 / CERT C EXP34-C
description: Pointer dereferenced before null check; GVN eliminates the guard as dead code at -O2.

name: Strict Aliasing Type Pun
description: float* and long* aliasing in fast_inv_sqrt; TBAA reorders loads at -O2.

name: Uninitialized Auth Variable
description: Authentication result variable uninitialized on failure path; undef propagated at -O2.

name: Shift Overflow in Parser
description: Shift by potentially large amount; signed overflow in parser guards eliminated at -O2.
